wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.noLocalSeed: You don't have a wallet on this device. Choose an option:
wallet.generateNewSeed: Generate New Seed (old key will expire)
wallet.lnAddressDescription: Register a reusable Lightning address to receive payments easily
wallet.walletOpenInAnotherTab: This wallet is active in another tab or window of this browser.
wallet.amountlessInvoice: Invoice has no amount. Enter amount.
wallet.unclaimedDepositDesc: Bitcoin received on-chain. Claim to add to your wallet balance.
wallet.claimFeeExceeded: Claim fee ({fee} sats) exceeds limit. You can claim manually with a higher fee or wait for lower fees.
wallet.noCameraAvailable: No camera available on this device
wallet.introDescription: Send and receive Bitcoin payments instantly with near-zero fees. Your keys stay on your device — only you control your funds.
wallet.introFeature1: Instant payments via Lightning Network — no waiting for confirmations
wallet.introFeature2: Your wallet keys never leave your device — fully non-custodial
wallet.introFeature3: Buy event tickets and transit passes directly from your wallet

seed.title: Set Up Your Wallet
seed.noSeedText: No saved seed phrase on this device. Restore it or create a new one.
seed.step1Description: Write down these 12 words in order. They are your wallet recovery phrase.
seed.step2Description: Verify you saved the words correctly
seed.step3Description: Create a 4-digit PIN to protect your seed
seed.warningText: This is your recovery phrase. Store it safely offline. If you lose it, you will lose access to your Bitcoin.
seed.verifyDescription: Enter the requested words to verify your backup
seed.verificationFailed: Words do not match. Please try again.
seed.createPinDescription: Create a 4-digit PIN to protect your wallet
seed.confirmPinDescription: Enter your PIN again to confirm
seed.pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Please try again.
seed.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
seed.existingKeyWarningTitle: You already have a signing key
seed.existingKeyWarningText: Your current signing key will be replaced when you generate a new one. Old signatures remain valid but you won't be able to sign new transactions with the old key.

seedRestore.title: Restore Wallet
seedRestore.subtitle: Enter your 12-word seed phrase
seedRestore.pasteAllWordsPlaceholder: word1 word2 word3 word4 word5 word6 word7 word8 word9 word10 word11 word12
seedRestore.invalidMnemonic: Invalid seed phrase. Please check your words.
seedRestore.restoreFailed: Failed to restore. Please try again.
